text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem nasa-mission-phase-cs

This case-sensitive code system https://mitre.org/fhir/space-health/CodeSystem/nasa-mission-phase-cs defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
preflight-training Preflight TrainingTraining activities conducted before launch to prepare crew for medical procedures.
preflight-activity Preflight ActivityMedical activities and examinations conducted before launch.
inflight In-FlightMedical activities conducted during spaceflight.
postflight PostflightMedical activities conducted after landing/return.
postflight-debrief Postflight DebriefDebriefing sessions conducted after mission completion.
continuous Continuous MonitoringOngoing monitoring throughout the mission duration.
ame Annual Medical ExaminationAnnual astronaut medical examination period.

name: NASAMissionPhaseCS
title: NASA Mission Phase Timing
description: Mission phases and timing codes for medical requirements scheduling.

concept.definition: Training activities conducted before launch to prepare crew for medical procedures.
Medical activities and examinations conducted before launch.
Debriefing sessions conducted after mission completion.
Ongoing monitoring throughout the mission duration.
